Clone the DeepSpeedExamples repository from https://github.com/microsoft/DeepSpeedExamples.git into the home directory
Navigate to the 'training/autotuning/hf/gpt2-xl' directory inside the cloned DeepSpeedExamples repository
Locate the 'test_tune.sh' script and copy its entire content as is
Clone the HuggingFace transformers repository from https://github.com/huggingface/transformers.git into the home directory
Navigate into the cloned transformers repository directory
Install the transformers package locally using 'pip install .'
Create a new directory named 'test' in the home directory and navigate into it
Install DeepSpeed and any other required dependencies using 'pip install deepspeed'
Create a new executable shell script 'test_tune.sh' in the 'test' directory and paste the copied content of the original 'test_tune.sh' into it
Modify the environment variable 'HF_PATH' inside the script to point to '../' (relative path to transformers repo)
Modify the environment variable 'NGPUS' inside the script to 6 (to match having 6 GPUs)
Verify that the system has 6 NVIDIA GPUs available (e.g., using 'nvidia-smi') and CUDA is configured properly
Run the tuning script with the command './test_tune.sh tune' from within the 'test' directory
Observe the script execution logs to confirm initialization messages from DeepSpeed autotuner, including creation of 'autotuning_exps' directories and resource detection
Wait for the autotuning process to begin the model info profile run and the scheduler to write ds_config and exp JSON files into 'autotuning_results/profile_model_info/'
Monitor for SSH permission warnings related to 'localhost' and confirm these do not block further progress
Continue until the autotuning step attempts to run DeepSpeed with the GPT-2 XL model configuration
Capture the error message output, specifically verifying that the failure is due to 'ParquetConfig.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'token''
Assert that the error message is present in the logs exactly as stated, confirming reproduction of the bug
Optionally, confirm that no optimal DeepSpeed configuration is found and autotuning ends prematurely due to this error
